info.title: MentorMinds Stellar API
info.description: Backend API for the MentorMinds platform — connecting mentors and mentees with Stellar blockchain payments.

bearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT access token obtained from /auth/login

get.summary: List all users with optional filters

put.summary: Activate or deactivate a user account

get.summary: List all sessions with optional status filter
List all payments with optional date range filter

example.notes: Refund issued to mentee after review

get.summary: Get top mentors by revenue and sessions
Get sessions requiring manual meeting setup (Admin only)
Get session details with meeting URL

post.summary: Confirm a booking and generate meeting URL

message.example: Booking confirmed and meeting room created successfully

207.description: Booking confirmed but meeting URL failed (partial success)

message.example: Booking confirmed but meeting URL could not be generated

warning.example: Meeting room creation failed. Manual intervention required.

get.summary: List mentors with filtering and pagination
Get paginated list of notifications (unread first)

put.summary: Mark a single notification as read

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate payments

post.summary: Confirm payment with Stellar transaction hash

example.bio: Experienced software engineer with 10 years in the industry

get.summary: Get public profile of a user
Get user by ID (owner or admin only)

403.description: Forbidden — not the owner or admin

put.summary: Update user by ID (owner or admin only)

delete.summary: Deactivate user by ID (owner or admin only)
